title: chrysanthemum korovinii
intro: Chrysanthemum korovinii, also known as Korovin's chrysanthemum or Mongolian chrysanthemum, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. Chrysanthemum korovinii is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving headaches and sinus congestion, and improving respiratory health. In herbal preparations, the flowers of Chrysanthemum korovinii are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
